{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Four Fangs of the Serpent
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Four Fangs of the Serpent]] is a move used by the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Four Fangs of the Serpent]] is a [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
